text: Except for actual service provided, a vessel of 20 tons or less is exempt from a charge for pilotage.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 64. Rates of Pilotage
##### § 64.005 — Exemptions from Pilotage Charges

Except for actual service provided, a vessel of 20 tons or less is exempt from a charge for pilotage.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: Except for actual service provided, a vessel of 20 tons or less is exempt from a charge for pilotage.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
